DECLARATION OF RAIZSA M. REBOREDO IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO COMPEL INDEPENDENT MENTAL EXAMINATION OF PLAINTIFF TRENA NELSON AND, IF NECESSARY, AUGMENT EXPERT WITNESS LIST (TRANSACTION ID # 100082110) FILED BY DEFENDANT DENTRUST DENTAL INTERNATIONAL, INC.
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-26-2019 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, MOTION TO COMPEL INDEPENDENT MENTAL EXAMINATION OF PLAINTIFF TRENA NELSON AND, IF NECESSARY, AUGMENT EXPERT WITNESS LIST IS DENIED. THE PARTIES DISCLOSED EXPERTS PURSUANT TO CCP 2034.260. NEITHER PARTY DESIGNATED A RETAINED EXPERT. PLAINTIFF NAMED TWO TREATING HEALTH CARE PROVIDERS AS NON-RETAINED EXPERTS: DR. ARMIJO, WHO IS A FAMILY PHYSICIAN; AND MR. TOCK, A LICENSED SOCIAL WORKER. DEFENDANT CANNOT USE A SUPPLEMENTAL LIST TO ADD DR. GREENE, A FORENSIC PSYCHIATRIST, AS A RETAINED EXPERT ON NEW SUBJECTS NOT RAISED BY PLAINTIFF'S DESIGNATION. SEE CCP 2034.280(A). DEFENDANT ALSO DOES NOT MEET THE STATUTORY REQUIREMENTS FOR AMENDING ITS EXPERT WITNESS LIST TO ADD DR. GREENE. SEE CCP 2034.620(C). DEFENDANT CHOSE NOT TO DISCLOSE AN EXPERT, OR TO SEEK A MENTAL EXAM BEFORE NOW, DESPITE HAVING NOTICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR MENTAL AND EMOTIONAL DISTRESS FROM THE PLEADINGS AND OTHER DISCOVERY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED, JUDGE: AARON MINNIS; CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY (D302/JPT).

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Independent Mental Examination Of Plaintiff Trena Nelson And, If Necessary, Augment Expert Witness List
Off Calendar Sep-26-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance:

Denied. The parties disclosed experts pursuant to CCP 2034.260. Neither party designated a retained expert. Plaintiff named two treating health care providers as non-retained experts: Dr. Armijo, who is a family physician; and Mr. Tock, a licensed social worker. Defendant cannot use a supplemental list to add Dr. Greene, a forensic psychiatrist, as a retained expert on new subjects not raised by Plaintiff's designation. See CCP 2034.280(a). Defendant also does not meet the statutory requirements for amending its expert witness list to add Dr. Greene. See CCP 2034.620(c). Defendant chose not to disclose an expert, or to seek a mental exam before now, despite having notice of Plaintiff's claim for mental and emotional distress from the pleadings and other discovery. Prevailing party to prepare Order. proceedings not reported, Judge: Aaron Minnis; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany (D302/jpt).
